text: 35. Subcontractor shall clean  countertop  of all  dirt,  foreign  materials,  stains,  and  other  defacements.  All  damaged countertops  shall  be  replaced  or  repaired  at  the  discretion  of  the  Contractor.  Non-stainless  steel  connection materials will be corrosion protected. All countertops shall be clean and presented to the Contractor for review once installation is complete. No Work will be complete until it has been cleaned and presented for review.
